# Feature Request

## Summary
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## Problem / Motivation
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What pain point or limitation are you running into?
     e.g. "As a recruiter, I can't currently filter candidates by a minimum score threshold, which means I have to scroll through the full ranked list manually." -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the feature or change you'd like, as specifically as possible. -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Have you thought of any other ways to solve the problem? Why is your proposed solution better? -->

## Who Does This Benefit?
<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Recruiters / hiring managers
- [ ] Job applicants
- [ ] Developers / contributors
- [ ] All users

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any mockups, examples, references to similar features in other tools, or anything else that helps illustrate the request. -->

## Are you willing to work on this?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a pull request for this feature
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting it
